name: 幸存者乐园
short_description: 2050, a future world we had dreamed about. But suddenly, a disaster arrived, bringing the human into a desperate situation.
detailed_description:
2050, a future world we had dreamed about.
But suddenly, a disaster arrived, bringing the human into a desperate situation.
Wandering among the ruins of human civilization, I linger.
But until the day I met a bionic girl, the truth of the catastrophe was finally revealed.
Now, the fate of human civilization is in my hand...

Game elements
**AVG alternates with text dialogue mode to diversify the game experience;
**High freedom of choice, clues and doubts are controlled by one hand;
**Exquisite characterization, rich branch plot;
**The content of the script is 30000 words;
